nf/quick-397-rebase.task_description: Fix coderlm-adapter.cjs API parameter and response parsing mismatches: (1) getImplementation needs file param + parses source not line, (2) findTests needs symbol param, (3) peek uses wrong URL params (start/end vs start_line/end_line) and wrong response field (lines vs content), (4) getCallers with undefined file sends file=undefined
nf/quick-397-rebase.approach: Update four methods in createAdapter() in bin/coderlm-adapter.cjs to match the actual coderlm server API: add missing required parameters, fix URL query param names, and align response parsing with actual server response shapes.
out_of_scope: Changing the coderlm-lifecycle.cjs or binary download/spawn logic
Adding session management (already implemented — ensureSession/sessionHeaders exist)
Modifying coderlm.md skill (only adapter layer is in scope)
Changing the LRU cache strategy or metrics collection
Adding new query endpoints or methods
nf/quick-397-rebase.risk_reason: Single file change in bin/ with existing callers in nf-solve.cjs and formal-scope-scan.cjs.
